channel.title: GitHub MATLAB Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of MATLAB in GitHub

item.title: dawnlh/awesome-low-light-image-enhancement
item.description: This is a resouce list for low light image enhancement

item.title: fieldtrip/fieldtrip
item.description: The MATLAB toolbox for MEG, EEG and iEEG analysis

item.title: bw1129/PIDtoolbox
item.description: PIDtoolbox is a set of graphical tools for analyzing blackbox log data

item.title: TadasBaltrusaitis/OpenFace
item.description: OpenFace – a state-of-the art tool intended for facial landmark detection, head pose estimation, facial action unit recognition, and eye-gaze estimation.

item.title: fangq/jsonlab
item.description: JSONLab: compact, portable, robust JSON/binary-JSON encoder/decoder for MATLAB/Octave

item.title: mathworks/MATLAB-Simulink-Challenge-Project-Hub
item.description: This MATLAB and Simulink Challenge Project Hub contains a list of research and design project ideas. These projects will help you gain practical experience and insight into technology trends and industry directions.

item.title: lzz19980125/awesome-time-series-segmentation-papers
item.description: This repository contains a reading list of papers on Time Series Segmentation. This repository is still being continuously improved.
